pi_items.source: Searched employee CSV files (employees_import.csv, bangalore_employees.csv, innovation_team.csv, project_leads.csv, q4_new_hires.csv) - employee not found in any import data. Not verifiable from static data files.
Searched all employee CSV files and data sources - Elena Rossi appears only in task description and verifier.py, not in actual employee data files
No verifiable source found. Referenced only in task.json description and verifier.py. Cannot be cross-referenced with any data source or documentation.
Referenced in task.json and verifier.py. Valid ISO 8601 date format. Cannot be verified against actual data without database access or export script execution.
Task description explicitly states 'Alert/Warning: Set to 60 days before expiry' and verifier.py target_alert = 60
File does not exist. Checked entire attendhrm_env/data directory - no PDF files present. No passport_sample.pdf found anywhere in the codebase.

privileged_info_summary: The AttendHRM task operates on a Firebird database with credentials SYSDBA/masterkey. The task requires adding a 60-day expiry alert for a passport document with expiration date 2030-01-14. However, critical task implementation files (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the task directory despite being referenced in task.json hooks, and the required sample file (passport_sample.pdf) does not exist in the data directory.
